DESCRIPTION: Generic Record Header

Quality of MDR has been degraded from nominal due to an instrument degradation. Occurs if any of F_NN_DT, F_NN_PDP, F_NN_RAD, F_NN_WLS_U, F_NN_WLS_I, F_NN_SLS_U, F_NN_SLS_I, F_SAT, F_MIN in PCD_BASIC has been raised. Up to processor version 3.2.11, F_HOT also counted as instrument degradation
Quality of MDR has been degraded from nominal due to a processing degradation. Occurs if F_MISS or F_OLD_CAL_DATA in PCD_BASIC have been raised
Flag indicating non-nominal detector temperature, per channel
Flag indicating non-nominal pre-disperser temperature
Flag indicating non-nominal radiator temperature
Flag indicating non-nominal WLS voltage
Flag indicating non-nominal WLS current
Flag indicating non-nominal SLS voltage
Flag indicating non-nominal SLS current
Flag indicating invalid UTC
Flag indicating missing data packets
Flag indicating saturated pixels, per band and read-out
Flag indicating hot pixels, per band and read-out
Flag indicating whether read-out is in the SAA
Flag indicating danger of sun-glint per read-out
Flag indicating high danger of sun-glint per read-out
Flag indicating danger of rainbow per read-out
Flag indicating possible mismatch between observation mode and geolocation
Flag indicating that mean raw signal is below a specified threshold, per band and read-out
Mean raw signal per band

Flag to indicate that old in-flight auxiliary calibration data is in use (0 = no in-flight auxiliary calibration data is old, 1 = dark signal correction old, 2 = PPG correction old, 4 = spectral calibration parameters old, 8 = etalon correction old, 16 = SMR old)

Observation mode (0 = nadir, 1 = north pole scanning, 2 = south pole scanning, 3 = other scanning, 4 = nadir static, 5 = other static, 6 = dark, 7 = LED, 8 = WLS, 9 = SLS, 10 = SLS over diffuser, 11 = sun, 12 = moon, 13 = idle, 14 = test, 15 = dump, 16 = invalid)
PMD transfer mode (1 = band + raw, 2 = band + mixed, 3 = raw transfer, 4 = various (PMD transfer mode changes within a scan))
PMD readout mode (0 = nominal, 1 = solar, 2 = calibration, 3 = various (PMD readout mode changes within a scan))
Scanner viewing angle with additional element at end of scan
UTC time associated with every second scanner position (0, 2, ..., 62)
Geodetic latitude and geocentric longitude of sub-satellite point (earth-fixed CS)
Geodetic altitude of satellite (earth-fixed CS)
Solar zenith angle (Satellite Relative Actual CS)
Solar azimuth angle (Satellite Relative Actual CS)
Temperature of the pre-disperser prism for reference to the corresponding spectral calibration parameters
FPA temperature, per channel
Radiator temperature
Integration times per band
Number of elements per band data record for the 10 bands that follow (n1, n2, ..., n10)
Number of band data records for the 10 bands that follow (m1, m2, ..., m10)
